figures.caption: Fig. 1: Plots present the per-task cumulative regret vs. round. Figure 1a presents plot varying the feature dimension d as {100,20,300}. Figure 1b presents plot by varying rank r as {2,4,8}. Figure 1c presents plot varying the number of tasks T as {200,400,800}. The parameters are set as d = 100,T = 100,r = 2,N1 = 20,N = 600.
